auditor: Fort Group Chartered Professional Accountants Inc.
one_time_description: Accrued legal settlement fees related to E. Anthony Ross vs. client judgment ($2,150,000 total, $1,200,000 accrued) and demand loan of $4,482,757 related to Comprehensive Settlement Agreement; $4,433,224 accrued legal settlement fees recorded in accounts payable
economic_notes: First Nation operating grocery store, gas bar, restaurant, motel and entertainment centre, arena and VLT. Comprehensive Settlement Agreement with Canada and Manitoba negotiated re: flooding, total proposed amount $75,078,354 with $29,175,774 remaining unpaid at year-end. COVID-19 pandemic noted as ongoing concern.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Province is Manitoba. 8 consolidated subsidiaries including arena/lottery, CMHC housing authority, grocery store/gas bar, health authority, HRDS, restaurant/gas, daycare, and motel/entertainment centre. Large accrued legal settlement fees of $4,433,224 recorded. Comprehensive Settlement Agreement with Canada and Manitoba re: flooding not yet finalized at audit date; $29.2M unpaid. Demand loan of $4,482,757 taken to fund settlement. Net debt position of $18.26M. COVID-19 impact noted. No schedule of remuneration provided in document. Wages per expenses by object: $4,548,146; segmented total wages show $4,862,669 (difference may be due to segmentation adjustments). Annual debt service reflects long-term debt repayments only per cash flow statement.
